data.body: 6fe2 Phase 4d: held out 20 edge/contract/helper-matrix tests (stashed outside worktree); trimmed test_creation_channel.py to 3 primary create-per-interface happy-path tests (lint-clean, RED confirmed). Dispatched implementation subagent with full ACs + code seams + happy-path oracle only (NOT the held-out tests). It implements: common.schema enum, gen_types const->Literal[True], _version validate_creation_channel + vocab constant + drift test, create_core kw-only channel + validation, per-boundary defaults (python/cli/mcp), identity signatures, process_create projection (legacy->unknown), _IMMUTABLE_EDIT_FIELDS guard in process_edit, ticket_state schema fields, types.py regen, docs. Awaiting implementer; then I restore the full oracle and validate (happy+edge+e2e) + mutation/teeth check.
